detail.title: Donation Detail
detail.replacedByLink: This receipt has been replaced by

errors.sod: You are the creator of this record — the approver must be a different person (Segregation of Duties)
errors.statusConflict: This record has already been processed — please reload the page to see the latest status
errors.reasonRequired: Please provide a reason before proceeding
errors.network: Save failed — please check your connection and try again
errors.nationalId: National ID / Tax ID must be 13 digits
errors.fileTypeRejected: File type not supported — only JPG, PNG, PDF up to 10 MB
errors.fileTooLarge: File exceeds 10 MB — please choose a smaller file
errors.returnRejectWithoutReason: Please provide a reason before proceeding
errors.piiNoPermission: You do not have permission to reveal this information

noRecords.heading: No donations yet
noRecords.body: Click "Create Donation" to record your first entry

noSearchResults.heading: No records match your filters
noSearchResults.body: Try adjusting your filters or clearing the search

noQueue.heading: No items pending review
noQueue.body: Records submitted for review will appear here

rejectPermanent.title: Confirm Permanent Rejection
rejectPermanent.body: This record will be permanently rejected and cannot be resubmitted for approval.

voidReceipt.title: Confirm Receipt Cancellation
voidReceipt.body: Receipt {receiptFormatted} will be cancelled. The number will remain in the system for audit purposes.

voidWithEDonation.title: Confirm Cancellation — This receipt has been keyed into e-Donation
voidWithEDonation.alert: This receipt has been entered into the Revenue Department's e-Donation system. Please confirm that you have corrected or revoked the entry on the RD side before cancelling in this system.
voidWithEDonation.rdConfirmLabel: Confirm what action was taken on the RD side *
voidWithEDonation.confirm: Confirm RD action completed and cancel receipt

voidAndReissue.title: Confirm Void and Reissue
voidAndReissue.body: Receipt {receiptFormatted} will be cancelled and a new record will be created for a replacement. The replacement must go through normal approval and will receive a new receipt number.

returnForEdit.title: Return Record for Edit
returnForEdit.body: The Maker will be notified to edit and resubmit.

revealPii.title: Reveal National ID / Tax ID
revealPii.body: Viewing this information will be recorded in the audit log with your name and timestamp.

form.emailHelper: Used to send the receipt by email (optional)
form.nationalIdEditHelper: For security, the previous ID is never displayed — please re-enter it in full to save changes.
form.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes — leave this page?
form.donorLanguageHelper: Sets the language of the receipt PDF and email sent to the donor

slip.dragOrClick: Drag and drop a file, or
slip.formatHint: JPG, PNG, PDF up to 10 MB

consent.label: I confirm that the donor has been informed of and consented to the hospital collecting, using, and disclosing their personal data for the purpose of issuing the donation receipt and tax filing, in accordance with the Privacy Policy version {version}

pii.revealTooltip: Revealed data will be hidden when you reload the page
pii.revealAuditNote: This reveal has been recorded in the audit log

emailDelivery.heading: Email Delivery
emailDelivery.noEmailBody: Please download the PDF to deliver it to the donor another way
emailDelivery.notProcessedBody: The system is preparing the receipt PDF and email. Please wait a moment.
emailDelivery.sendFailed: Email delivery failed{errorSuffix} Please check the donor's email and try again
emailDelivery.downloadDisabledTooltip: The PDF is not ready to download yet
emailDelivery.resendErrorToast: Failed to resend the email — please try again later or download the PDF instead

settings.saveSuccessToast: Settings saved — takes effect immediately for new receipts (already-issued receipts are unchanged)
settings.saveValidationError: Save failed — the template has an error. Please check variables/HTML syntax
settings.saveNetworkError: Failed to save settings — please check your connection and try again
settings.loadError: Could not load settings — please try again

template.helperText: Edit the receipt template HTML. Use variables such as {{.DonorName}}, {{.Amount}}, {{.ReceiptNo}}
template.infoBanner: This preview renders in a restricted sandbox — no JavaScript runs and no data is loaded from the internet
template.previewEmptyBody: Edit the template on the left to see a live preview
template.renderPdfFailed: Failed to generate PDF preview — please try again or use the HTML preview instead
template.previewFailed: Preview failed — please check the template HTML

images.rejected: File not supported — only JPG, PNG up to 2 MB

taxText.helperText: This text must be confirmed with accounting/legal before publishing

numberFormat.freezeNote: Changing the format only affects new receipts — already-issued receipts keep their original format

edonation.heading: e-Donation Config
edonation.saveError: Failed to save e-Donation config — please try again
edonation.loadError: Could not load e-Donation config — please try again
edonation.fieldMappingHelper: Set the column order and Thai/English header labels for the e-Donation export file
edonation.nearDueDaysHelper: Number of days before the keying deadline to count as "near due"

eDonationExport.countPreviewUnavailable: A count preview is not available for this filter
eDonationExport.noRecordsBody: Try a different date range or keyed status
eDonationExport.noRecordsError: No records match the filter to export — please change the filter

confirmDialog.title: Confirm e-Donation Export
confirmDialog.warning: This file contains the full 13-digit national/tax ID of {n} donors. This export will be logged in the audit trail with the operator's name, time, and selected data range. Please store and delete the file securely after use. Do not upload it to any insecure system.
confirmDialog.warningNoCount: This file may contain the full 13-digit national/tax ID of donors. This export will be logged in the audit trail with the operator's name, time, and selected data range. Please store and delete the file securely after use. Do not upload it to any insecure system.

aging.markFailed: Failed to save keyed status — please try again
aging.loadFailed: Failed to load keyed-status tracking data — please try again
aging.noUnkeyedBody: No records pending keying at this time

reports.noDataHeading: No donation data in this period
reports.loadFailed: Failed to load the report — please check your connection and try again
reports.exportFailed: Failed to export the report — please try again
